Title: SignalRGB Glow - Screen __SCREEN_LABEL__
Desc: RGB-driven Lively wallpaper for monitor #__SCREEN_LABEL__. Connects to the SignalRGB Wallpaper Bridge and renders the matching SignalRGB device's effect through transparent regions of a background image. Settings (background image, layout, glow, sliders) are configured through the bridge's tray icon — Lively's own Customise panel is intentionally disabled here.
Author: Delido
